hypothesis: The v1.2 monolithic ExECT S2 field-family baseline on the full fixed validation split (40 records) tests whether frozen S1 v4.10 bridges plus investigation/comorbidity label policy generalize beyond the cap-25 gate without changing S1 scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
These are partial ExECT S2 diagnostics (S1 + investigation + comorbidity), not CUI-aware all-family benchmark reproduction.
Investigation labels use modality+result strings; comorbidities exclude seizure-history PatientHistory phrases.
S1 label-policy bridges from frozen v4.10 are reused for diagnosis, seizure type, and medication.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are systematically optimistic vs full validation (~7–9pp on S1); compare cap-25 and full with family breakdown, not pooled micro vs S1-only cap-25.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
